input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Get AO draw/results
with open('articles/2026/01/22/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        if 'draw and results' in title and 'australian open' in title:
            content = a.get('content','') or ''
            # Look for R3 results / R4 matchups
            for name in ['sabalenka', 'keys', 'mboko', 'paul', 'alcaraz']:
                idx = content.lower().find(name)
                if idx >= 0:
                    print(f'[{name}]: ...{content[max(0,idx-200):idx+300]}...')
                    print()
            break
"
